title: Bowery Boy
writer: Samuel Fuller, Sidney Sutherland, Robert Chapin
actors: Dennis O'Keefe, Louise Campbell, Jimmy Lydon
plot: Dr. Tom O'Hara takes over a public clinic in New York's desperately poor Bowery section. Boy gangleader Sock Dolan resents Tom's interference in moving Sock's kid brother to a hospital, because Sock blames hospitals for his mother...
